---
name: Design Update
about: Propose changes to UI designs or design system
title: '[DESIGN] '
labels: 'design'
assignees: ''

---

## Screen/Component Affected

**Screen ID (from Pencil):** (e.g., 7WE8A - Login Screen)

## Proposed Changes

### Visual Changes
- [ ] Color changes (specify hex codes)
- [ ] Spacing changes (specify values)
- [ ] Typography changes
- [ ] Layout changes
- [ ] New components

### Detailed Description

(Describe what you want to change and why)

## Screenshots/Mockups

**Before:**
(Screenshot or description)

**After:**
(Screenshot or mockup)

## Rationale

(Why is this change needed? User feedback? A/B test results? Accessibility?)

## Impact on Implementation

### Files to Update
- [ ] `sat-prep-mobile.pen` or `sat-prep.pen`
- [ ] `DESIGN.md` (update decision log)
- [ ] Flutter constants: `app_colors.dart`, `app_text_styles.dart`, etc.
- [ ] Web dashboard: Tailwind config, CSS variables, etc.

### Estimated Effort for Developer
- **Time:** (e.g., 30 minutes, 2 hours, 1 day)
- **Complexity:** Easy / Medium / Hard

### Breaking Change?
- [ ] Yes - Requires rework of existing implementation
- [ ] No - Only affects new features

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Pencil file updated
- [ ] Screenshots exported
- [ ] DESIGN.md updated
- [ ] Developer notified
- [ ] Implementation matches new design

## Additional Notes

(Any other context or considerations)
